  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant",
  "description": "EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources is a dynamic, multi-sector business dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable solutions across the energy, real estate, and general trading industries. The company specializes in solar energy sales and services, providing sustainable and cost-effective power solutions to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We&rsquo;re seeking an experienced Executive PA to provide top-tier administrative support to our CEO.


Responsibilities


	Act as the first point of contact for the CEO with internal and external clients
	Handle incoming requests and queries appropriately
	Manage the CEO&rsquo;s diary, schedule meetings and appointments, and provide reminders
	Book and manage complex travel arrangements
	Develop and maintain an efficient documentation and filing system
	Produce reports, presentations, and briefs as needed


Requirements


	Comprehensive understanding of office management systems and applications
	Exceptional planning and time management skills
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Discretion and confidentiality
	A qualification as a PA is advantageous.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: integratedresourcesemadorniger@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Personal Assistant Job at EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources




        
    

        
        EMADOR Nigeria Integrated Resources is a dynamic, multi-sector business dedicated to delivering innovative and reliable solutions across the energy, real estate, and general trading industries. The company specializes in solar energy sales and services, providing sustainable and cost-effective power solutions to homes and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We’re seeking an experienced Executive PA to provide top-tier administrative support to our CEO.


Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Act as the first point of contact for the CEO with internal and external clients
	Handle incoming requests and queries appropriately
	Manage the CEO’s diary, schedule meetings and appointments, and provide reminders
	Book and manage complex travel arrangements
	Develop and maintain an efficient documentation and filing system
	Produce reports, presentations, and briefs as needed


Requirements


	Comprehensive understanding of office management systems and applications
	Exceptional planning and time management skills
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Discretion and confidentiality
	A qualification as a PA is advantageous.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Engineer (Roads & Highways)",
  "description": "AIM Consultants Limited is a multidisciplinary engineering consultancy firm delivering innovative and high-quality solutions across the built environment. We specialize in engineering design, project management, and infrastructure development across residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

We are committed to excellence, professionalism, and continuous improvement, providing a collaborative work environment where skilled professionals can grow and contribute to impactful projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer (Roads &amp; Highways)

Job Location: Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	The Road Design &amp; Supervision Engineer is responsible for the design, review, and supervision of road infrastructure projects, ensuring compliance with client requirements, applicable standards, and project specifications.
	The role provides technical support throughout the project lifecycle, from planning and design to construction supervision and project completion.


Main Job Tasks and Responsibilities


	Prepare preliminary and detailed designs for road infrastructure projects.
	Develop and review engineering drawings using AutoCAD, Civil 3D, or similar software.
	Interpret survey, geotechnical, and traffic data for design development.
	Design road alignments, pavements, drainage systems, culverts, and related infrastructure.
	Ensure designs comply with client requirements, statutory regulations, and engineering standards.
	Provide technical support and recommendations during project planning and execution.
	Supervise construction activities to ensure compliance with approved designs and specifications.
	Conduct site inspections and monitor the quality and progress of works.
	Review contractor submissions, shop drawings, method statements, and material approvals.
	Identify technical issues and recommend appropriate solutions.
	Coordinate with clients, contractors, consultants, and relevant stakeholders.
	Prepare technical reports, site inspection reports, and progress updates.
	Support quality assurance, quality control, and health, safety, and environmental (HSE) compliance.
	Assist in project planning, scheduling, and contract administration as required.
	Perform any other duties assigned by the Project Manager or Design Office Manager.


Education and Experience


	Master&rsquo;s or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in road design and construction supervision.
	Experience working on highway, urban road, bridge, or transportation infrastructure projects.
	Previous experience with consulting engineering firms is an advantage.
	Professional registration with the Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria (COREN) and membership with the Nigerian Society of Engineers (NSE) is a Must.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Civil 3D, and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Working knowledge of road design standards and construction specifications.
	Ability to interpret engineering drawings, survey data, and technical reports.
	Familiarity with QA/QC processes and HSE requirements.
	Knowledge of relevant design codes and engineering best practices.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jobs@aim-consultants.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "AIM Consultants Limited"
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

  },

Civil Engineer (Roads & Highways) Job at AIM Consultants Limited




        
    

        
        AIM Consultants Limited is a multidisciplinary engineering consultancy firm delivering innovative and high-quality solutions across the built environment. We specialize in engineering design, project management, and infrastructure development across residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

We are committed to excellence, professionalism, and continuous improvement, providing a collaborative work environment where skilled professionals can grow and contribute to impactful projects.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer (Roads & Highways)

Job Location: Akwa Ibom
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose
     

            
    




	The Road Design & Supervision Engineer is responsible for the design, review, and supervision of road infrastructure projects, ensuring compliance with client requirements, applicable standards, and project specifications.
	The role provides technical support throughout the project lifecycle, from planning and design to construction supervision and project completion.


Main Job Tasks and Responsibilities


	Prepare preliminary and detailed designs for road infrastructure projects.
	Develop and review engineering drawings using AutoCAD, Civil 3D, or similar software.
	Interpret survey, geotechnical, and traffic data for design development.
	Design road alignments, pavements, drainage systems, culverts, and related infrastructure.
	Ensure designs comply with client requirements, statutory regulations, and engineering standards.
	Provide technical support and recommendations during project planning and execution.
	Supervise construction activities to ensure compliance with approved designs and specifications.
	Conduct site inspections and monitor the quality and progress of works.
	Review contractor submissions, shop drawings, method statements, and material approvals.
	Identify technical issues and recommend appropriate solutions.
	Coordinate with clients, contractors, consultants, and relevant stakeholders.
	Prepare technical reports, site inspection reports, and progress updates.
	Support quality assurance, quality control, and health, safety, and environmental (HSE) compliance.
	Assist in project planning, scheduling, and contract administration as required.
	Perform any other duties assigned by the Project Manager or Design Office Manager.


Education and Experience


	Master’s or Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in road design and construction supervision.
	Experience working on highway, urban road, bridge, or transportation infrastructure projects.
	Previous experience with consulting engineering firms is an advantage.
	Professional registration with the Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria (COREN) and membership with the Nigerian Society of Engineers (NSE) is a Must.
	Proficiency in AutoCAD, Civil 3D, and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Working knowledge of road design standards and construction specifications.
	Ability to interpret engineering drawings, survey data, and technical reports.
	Familiarity with QA/QC processes and HSE requirements.
	Knowledge of relevant design codes and engineering best practices.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Perez MedCare Hospital offers care across a range of specialty medical and surgical services. Perez Medcare Hospital is a one-stop-center for the healths needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Prepare financial reports and reconciliations
	Manage hospital accounts and transactions
	Monitor expenses and budgets
	Maintain accurate financial records
	Ensure compliance with financial procedures and policies


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience
	Knowledge of accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong analytical and reporting skills
	Good communication and organizational ability
	Experience in hospital or healthcare accounting is an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: info@perezmedcare.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Accountant Job at Perez MedCare




        
    

        
        Perez Medcare is a medical outreach poised for excellence in both primary and secondary health care service delivery. We sustain integrity, professionalism premised on ethical standards and behaviour, empathy, efficiency, and care. Perez MedCare Hospital offers care across a range of specialty medical and surgical services. Perez Medcare Hospital is a one-stop-center for the healths needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Prepare financial reports and reconciliations
	Manage hospital accounts and transactions
	Monitor expenses and budgets
	Maintain accurate financial records
	Ensure compliance with financial procedures and policies


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	Minimum of 2 years of relevant experience
	Knowledge of accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong analytical and reporting skills
	Good communication and organizational ability
	Experience in hospital or healthcare accounting is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Castel Resources Consultancy Limited - We unlock your business&#39;s full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative, strategic, and results-driven Social Media Manager to manage the company&#39;s online presence, grow brand awareness, and create engaging content across multiple digital platforms.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about social media trends, audience engagement, and digital marketing.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies that align with business goals.
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and other platforms.
	Plan and execute content calendars, campaigns, and promotional activities.
	Monitor social media accounts, respond to messages and comments, and foster community engagement.
	Track, analyze, and report on social media performance using analytics tools.
	Collaborate with graphic designers, videographers, and the marketing team to produce high-quality content.
	Stay updated on industry trends, emerging platforms, and best practices.
	Manage paid social media campaigns to increase reach, engagement, and conversions.
	Ensure all content reflects the company&#39;s brand voice and identity.


Requirements


	B.Sc./HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Communications, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience managing social media accounts for a business or brand.
	Strong knowledge of Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and YouTube.
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar content creation tools.
	Excellent copywriting, communication, and storytelling skills.
	Knowledge of social media analytics and digital marketing strategies.
	Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.


Key Skills:


	Social Media Management
	Content Strategy &amp; Creation
	Community Engagement
	Digital Marketing
	Copywriting &amp; Brand Communication
	Analytics &amp; Performance Reporting


Preferred Candidate:


	Creative, innovative, and highly organized.
	Passionate about creating engaging digital content and growing online communities.
	Strong understanding of social media algorithms, trends, and audience behavior.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: castelhrjobs@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a creative, strategic, and results-driven Social Media Manager to manage the company's online presence, grow brand awareness, and create engaging content across multiple digital platforms.
	The ideal candidate should be passionate about social media trends, audience engagement, and digital marketing.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies that align with business goals.
	Create, schedule, and publish engaging content across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and other platforms.
	Plan and execute content calendars, campaigns, and promotional activities.

	Stay updated on industry trends, emerging platforms, and best practices.

	B.Sc./HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Communications, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience managing social media accounts for a business or brand.
	Strong knowledge of Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and YouTube.
	Proficiency in Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar content creation tools.
	Excellent copywriting, communication, and storytelling skills.
	Knowledge of social media analytics and digital marketing strategies.
	Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.


Key Skills:


	Social Media Management
	Content Strategy & Creation
	Community Engagement
	Digital Marketing

	Analytics & Performance Reporting


Preferred Candidate:


	Creative, innovative, and highly organized.
	Passionate about creating engaging digital content and growing online communities.
	Strong understanding of social media algorithms, trends, and audience behavior.
